Off Calendar Feb-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT MARK ROBERT CHECCHI'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO PROVIDE MORE FACTS ABOUT THE DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIONS AND THEIR NEXUS TO THE DENIAL OF HIS CLAIM. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
